ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the reading */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the reading was recorded */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the sensor location */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the sensor location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor location */,
  "vbat" REAL /* Voltage level of the sensor battery */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity, air quality) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "maintenance_interval" INTEGER /* Interval (in days) for regular maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES sensor_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the location */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone (e.g., tropical, temperate, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_firmware" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that uses the firmware */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the firmware */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_firmware_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware update */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware version updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the firmware was updated */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES sensor_firmware ("firmware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Value of the calibration */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration history event */,
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calibration event */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration history was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_history_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_id") REFERENCES sensor_calibration ("calibration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., cleaning, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance history event */,
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance event */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance history was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_maintenance_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_id") REFERENCES sensor_maintenance ("maintenance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Name of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sensor_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_associations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_user_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_associations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the data was requested */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the requested data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data requested (e.g., start date, end date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data download */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data request */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the data was downloaded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the downloaded data file */,
  "download_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the download process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_status_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that uses the battery */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery (e.g., lithium-ion, alkaline) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery (e.g., Ah) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_batteries_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery level entry */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery */,
  "level_date" TEXT /* Date the battery level was recorded */,
  "level" REAL /* Current battery level (e.g., %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_levels_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES sensor_batteries ("battery_id")
)
